bioinformatics_modality_core.title: Bioinformatics Modality Core Vocabulary v1
bioinformatics_modality_core.source: BioMedPilot curated shared medical vocabulary checklist

details.label: expression profiling
details.ambiguity_notes: Broad expression profiling term; may require platform disambiguation between sequencing and array.

details.label: transcriptome profiling
details.ambiguity_notes: Broad transcriptome modality.

details.label: RNA-seq

details.label: bulk RNA-seq
details.ambiguity_notes: Bulk assay distinct from single-cell RNA-seq.

details.label: mRNA expression profiling
details.ambiguity_notes: mRNA-specific expression modality.

details.label: microarray
details.ambiguity_notes: Broad chip term; expression array if transcriptomic context is present.

details.label: expression array
details.ambiguity_notes: Expression array, not SNP or methylation array.

details.label: single-cell RNA-seq
details.ambiguity_notes: Single-cell RNA-seq should not automatically expand to bulk RNA-seq.

details.label: single-nucleus RNA-seq
details.ambiguity_notes: Single-nucleus assay distinct from single-cell RNA-seq.

details.label: spatial transcriptomics
details.ambiguity_notes: Spatial transcriptomic assay.

details.label: long-read RNA-seq
details.ambiguity_notes: Long-read RNA sequencing modality.

details.label: total RNA-seq
details.ambiguity_notes: Total RNA library strategy.

details.label: ribo-depleted RNA-seq
details.ambiguity_notes: Ribo-depleted RNA library strategy.

details.label: polyA RNA-seq
details.ambiguity_notes: PolyA-selected RNA library strategy.

details.label: miRNA-seq
details.ambiguity_notes: microRNA sequencing.

details.label: microRNA profiling
details.ambiguity_notes: microRNA expression profiling.

details.label: lncRNA profiling
details.ambiguity_notes: lncRNA profiling.

details.label: circRNA profiling
details.ambiguity_notes: circRNA profiling.

details.label: small RNA-seq
details.ambiguity_notes: Small RNA sequencing.

details.label: DNA methylation array
details.ambiguity_notes: Methylation array assay, distinct from expression arrays.

details.label: methylation profiling
details.ambiguity_notes: Broad methylation profiling concept.

details.ambiguity_notes: Chromatin accessibility assay; not ChIP-seq.

matched_terms: cleavage under targets and release using nuclease
details.ambiguity_notes: Targeted chromatin profiling assay.

details.label: CUT&Tag
details.ambiguity_notes: Targeted chromatin profiling assay.

details.label: chromatin accessibility
details.ambiguity_notes: Broad accessibility concept, often ATAC-seq.

details.label: histone modification profiling
details.ambiguity_notes: Histone mark profiling, usually ChIP-seq/CUT&Tag context.

details.label: whole genome sequencing
details.ambiguity_notes: Whole genome sequencing, not whole exome sequencing.

details.label: whole exome sequencing
details.ambiguity_notes: Whole exome sequencing, not whole genome sequencing.

details.label: targeted sequencing
details.ambiguity_notes: Targeted sequencing assay.

details.label: panel sequencing
details.ambiguity_notes: Panel sequencing assay.

details.label: SNP array
details.ambiguity_notes: Genotyping array, not expression chip.

details.label: copy number variation
details.ambiguity_notes: CNV event/profiling term.

details.label: mutation profiling
details.ambiguity_notes: Mutation profiling concept.

details.label: somatic mutation
details.ambiguity_notes: Somatic variant concept.

details.label: germline variant
details.ambiguity_notes: Germline variant concept.

details.label: single-cell multiomics
details.ambiguity_notes: Broad single-cell multi-omics concept.

details.label: single-cell ATAC-seq
expected_terms: 单细胞染色质开放性测序
matched_terms: 单细胞染色质开放性测序
details.ambiguity_notes: Single-cell chromatin accessibility assay.

细胞索引转录组表位测序
matched_terms: cellular indexing of transcriptomes and epitopes by sequencing
细胞索引转录组表位测序
details.ambiguity_notes: Single-cell RNA plus protein tag assay.

details.label: single-cell proteogenomics
details.ambiguity_notes: Single-cell integrated protein/genomic assay concept.

details.label: multiome ATAC + gene expression
details.ambiguity_notes: Joint ATAC and gene expression assay.

details.label: cell type annotation
details.ambiguity_notes: Analytic output term, not disease.

details.label: cell clustering
details.ambiguity_notes: Single-cell analysis term.

details.label: proteomics
details.ambiguity_notes: Proteomics should not expand to metabolomics.

details.label: mass spectrometry proteomics
details.ambiguity_notes: Mass spectrometry proteomics.

details.label: phosphoproteomics
details.ambiguity_notes: Post-translational modification proteomics.

details.label: metabolomics
details.ambiguity_notes: Metabolomics should not expand to proteomics.

details.label: lipidomics
details.ambiguity_notes: Lipidomics is related to but distinct from broad metabolomics.

details.label: glycomics
details.ambiguity_notes: Glycomics assay concept.

details.label: CRISPR screen
details.ambiguity_notes: Functional genomics screen.

details.label: RNAi screen
details.ambiguity_notes: RNA interference screen.

details.label: shRNA screen
details.ambiguity_notes: shRNA screening assay.

details.label: Perturb-seq
details.ambiguity_notes: Single-cell perturbation assay.

details.label: drug screen
details.ambiguity_notes: Functional drug screening term.

details.label: survival data
details.ambiguity_notes: Clinical endpoint metadata, not assay.

details.label: clinical metadata
details.ambiguity_notes: Clinical metadata term.

details.label: phenotype data
details.ambiguity_notes: Phenotype metadata term.

details.label: immune infiltration
details.ambiguity_notes: Computational phenotype term.

details.label: tumor microenvironment
details.ambiguity_notes: Tumor microenvironment analytic concept.

details.label: pathway activity
details.ambiguity_notes: Pathway-level analytic term.

details.label: gene signature
details.ambiguity_notes: Gene signature analytic term.

details.label: sequencing
details.ambiguity_notes: Broad ambiguous sequencing term; do not strongly infer a specific sequencing assay.

meta_analysis_terms_core.title: Meta Analysis Terms Core Vocabulary v1
meta_analysis_terms_core.source: BioMedPilot curated shared medical vocabulary checklist

details.label: hazard ratio
details.ambiguity_notes: HR may also mean heart rate; use as effect measure in Meta Analysis context.

details.label: odds ratio
details.ambiguity_notes: OR must not match lowercase word or.

details.label: risk ratio
details.ambiguity_notes: RR overlaps relative risk.

details.label: relative risk
details.ambiguity_notes: Relative risk often abbreviated RR.

details.label: mean difference
details.ambiguity_notes: MD can be an abbreviation in other domains; keep as effect measure.

details.label: correlation coefficient
details.ambiguity_notes: Lowercase r is not added as a strict abbreviation to avoid broad matching.

details.label: confidence interval
details.ambiguity_notes: CI must not match ordinary text.

details.label: standard error
details.ambiguity_notes: SE is a short token requiring strict boundary matching.

details.label: p value
details.ambiguity_notes: Single P is not added as strict abbreviation to avoid broad matching.

details.label: overall survival
details.ambiguity_notes: OS is an outcome abbreviation only in Meta Analysis context.

details.label: complete response
details.ambiguity_notes: CR may also mean complete remission or other terms.

details.label: partial response
details.ambiguity_notes: PR can also mean progesterone receptor; keep ambiguous.

details.label: stable disease

high_risk_ambiguity_terms.note: Odds ratio; must not match lowercase word or.
Overall survival in Meta Analysis context only.
Hazard ratio; may also mean heart rate.
Partial response; may also mean progesterone receptor.
Stable disease; may also mean standard deviation.
Progressive disease; may also mean Parkinson disease.
Confidence interval; short token requires strict boundary.
Mean difference; short token requires strict boundary.
Standardized mean difference.
Standard error; may also be broad abbreviation.
Risk ratio or relative risk; short token requires strict boundary.

details.label: colon cancer
avoid_expansion_to: rectal cancer unless colorectal context is explicit

details.label: head and neck squamous cell carcinoma
expected_terms: head and neck squamous cell carcinoma
matched_terms: head and neck squamous cell carcinoma

details.label: rectal cancer
avoid_expansion_to: colon cancer unless colorectal context is explicit

details.label: large cell lung carcinoma
details.parent_concept: lung cancer, non-small cell lung cancer

details.label: acute lymphoblastic leukemia
expected_terms: 急性淋巴母细胞白血病
matched_terms: 急性淋巴母细胞白血病
details.confusion_notes: ALL is an oncology abbreviation but should be treated cautiously outside hematology context.

details.label: cutaneous squamous cell carcinoma
avoid_expansion_to: head and neck squamous cell carcinoma
details.confusion_notes: SCC alone is ambiguous and should not strongly expand without an anatomic site.

details.label: 小细胞肺癌
details.confusion_notes: Small cell lung cancer is a high-value lung subtype but not represented as a TCGA project in the core 33.

details.label: 多发性骨髓瘤
details.confusion_notes: MM is useful in oncology but should be interpreted with context outside cancer queries.

details.label: 脑膜瘤
details.confusion_notes: Meningioma should not be collapsed into glioma.

high_risk_ambiguity_terms.risk: squamous cell carcinoma without anatomic site
high_risk_ambiguity_terms.policy: do not strongly expand without site context

high_risk_ambiguity_terms.risk: renal cell carcinoma abbreviation without subtype
high_risk_ambiguity_terms.policy: do not expand to all kidney cancer subtypes from RCC alone

high_risk_ambiguity_terms.risk: mostly papillary thyroid carcinoma in oncology but can be non-oncology outside context
high_risk_ambiguity_terms.policy: allow oncology mapping but keep leakage tests
maps to colorectal parent, not isolated colon or rectal subtype

high_risk_ambiguity_terms.risk: multiple myeloma abbreviation can be non-oncology outside context
high_risk_ambiguity_terms.policy: prefer oncology mapping only with cancer or hematology context

gates.description: Common cancer checklist coverage must stay >= 95%.
TCGA project checklist coverage must stay >= 90%.
GTEx tissue weighted coverage must stay >= 95%.
Meta outcome, design, effect-size, and publication filter terms must stay >= 90%.
Oncology core checklist coverage must stay >= 95%.
Oncology core must cover all TCGA 33 project candidates.
Endocrine/metabolic core checklist coverage must stay >= 95%.
Endocrine/metabolic core should not have missing expected terms.
Anatomy/tissue core checklist coverage must stay >= 95%.
Anatomy/tissue core must cover expected GTEx tissue candidates.
Anatomy/tissue core must cover expected TCGA primary sites.
Bioinformatics modality core checklist coverage must stay >= 95%.
Bioinformatics modality core should not have missing expected terms.
Meta analysis terms core checklist coverage must stay >= 95%.
Meta analysis terms core should not have missing expected terms.
Cardiovascular core checklist coverage must stay >= 95%.
Cardiovascular core should not have missing expected terms.
Immune/inflammatory core checklist coverage must stay >= 95%.
Immune/inflammatory core should not have missing expected terms.
Reference checklist missing count must remain zero.
P0 gaps must remain zero.
Meta audit details must not report TCGA or GTEx matches.
